config.finNote: Financial context 2026/27: PSR replaced by Squad Cost Ratio, so clubs may spend max 85% of revenue on wages, agent fees and amortised transfer fees.
config.sourcesNote: Data compiled from Sky Sports, ESPN, The Athletic (Ornstein), Fabrizio Romano, Football365, FootballTransfers & Squawka. Fees include reported add-ons; free transfers shown as £0. Value Scores and credibility ratings are TransferIntel editorial models, not market prices.

Tottenham.needs: A striker (Kroupi/Savinho chase) after ~£230m spent on midfield & defence. Squad Cost Ratio headroom shrinking fast.
Tottenham.ctx: Biggest spenders in Europe this summer after two 17th-place finishes. De Zerbi given full backing: Tonali, Fernandes, van Hecke + 3 frees.

Man City.needs: Midfield depth behind Anderson (Bouaddi tracked); resolve Savinho's future.
Man City.ctx: One huge swing: £116m club-record Anderson. Bernardo Silva and Stones off the wage bill.

Chelsea.needs: Left-back to replace Cucurella (Chavarría talks live) and a senior CB (Lacroix).
Chelsea.ctx: Five ins already, mostly U21. The amortisation playbook under the new SCR rules.

Arsenal.needs: The whole attack: linked with Álvarez, Rogers, Tzolis and Barcola. Only Hincapié in so far.
Arsenal.ctx: Quiet start, loud rumors. Trossard exit agreed; Kiwior sold. War chest waiting for the World Cup to end.

Man Utd.needs: Midfield sorted if Tielemans + Santos land; RB (Williams link is noise) and a striker after Højlund's exit.
Man Utd.ctx: The Éderson medical collapse → 72-hour Tielemans pivot was the window's best recovery. ~£85m committed.

Liverpool.needs: A right-sided forward (Barcola linked) after Salah's departure; Robertson & Konaté also gone.
Liverpool.ctx: Jacquet (£60m) + Muñoz (£34.5m) in; three legends out. A generational reset.

Newcastle.needs: A creative midfielder after losing Manzambi to Villa's hijack; keep Guimarães (Arsenal circling).
Newcastle.ctx: £111m banked from Tonali & Gordon. Touré (£42m) + Jaouen in. Selling club against their will.

Aston Villa.needs: Replace Tielemans (clause triggered) and possibly Watkins/Rogers if bids land.
Aston Villa.ctx: Manzambi hijack (~£52m) shows ambition, but Rogers at £130m is the domino everyone watches.

Brighton.needs: CB depth arriving (Vusković agreed). Van Hecke money already reinvested.
Brighton.ctx: £52m in for van Hecke, ~£100m spent across five buys. The machine hums.

Everton.needs: A striker to finish the rebuild.
Everton.ctx: Hackney + Röhl = smart, mid-priced midfield surgery. ~£46m spent.

Bournemouth.needs: Striker (Á. Rodríguez linked) after Kroupi interest exploded; lost Senesi free.
Bournemouth.ctx: Selling window looming: Kroupi could bring £75m+.

Crystal Palace.needs: Keep Lacroix or bank £35m; striker interest in Kolo Muani.
Crystal Palace.ctx: Quietest window so far. One out, none in.

Nott'm Forest.needs: Replace Anderson's engine: £116m to spend and a hole in midfield.
Nott'm Forest.ctx: Record sale. The reinvestment defines their season.

West Ham.needs: Midfield creativity after cashing £85m for Fernandes.
West Ham.ctx: One big sale, quiet on arrivals so far.
